results.rendered_html:
ava-√bhās -bhāsate, to shine forth, be brilliant,  MBh. ;  BhP. ;
to become manifest, appear as (instr.) :
Caus. P. (p. -bhāsayat, wrongly written -bhāṣayat,  MBh. xii, 8345 ) to illuminate,  MBh.  &c.;
to make manifest,  Suśr.

results.rendered_html:
avabhās 1 A.
1 To shine; nātyarthamastrairavabhāsamānaḥ  Ki. 3. 46 ; sa tejasā sūrya ivāvabhāsate  Mb. 
2 To shine forth, become manifest; āhosvinmukhamavabhāsate yuvatyāḥ  Śi. 8. 29. 
3 To appear, seem (apparently or falsely); etattrayaṃ taptāyaḥpiṃḍavadekatvenāvabhāsate  Vedānta .
— Caus. To irradiate, illuminate; adhikāvabhāsitadiśāṃ nikaraḥ  Śi. 9. 37.
